description_long: This is a rectangular, modern school building with a flat gray roof and a facade featuring horizontal wooden paneling. The front side displays a series of large, rectangular windows arranged in two rows, with a section of smaller windows and a prominent glass-walled corner, likely an entrance or lobby area. The building sits on a light green base, suggesting a raised foundation or partial basement. The sides are mostly solid with minimal fenestration, emphasizing privacy and insulation. The rear features a mix of window sizes and a service entrance, while the overall design is clean and geometric, typical of contemporary educational architecture. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from wood, glass, and concrete, with a focus on natural light and functional space.
description: A modern, rectangular school building with a flat gray roof, wooden paneling, and large glass windows, featuring a prominent glass-walled corner and a raised green base.
description_view_0: The front view shows large horizontal windows, a section of smaller windows, and a glass-walled corner, likely the main entrance.
description_view_1: The left side view is mostly solid wood paneling with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mix of window sizes and a service entrance, with the green base visible along the bottom.
description_view_3: The right side view features a few small windows and a door, with the green base extending along the bottom.
